OpenClaw Gateway

☷
Click Check Health to connect to OpenClaw gateway
Legal compliance and retsinformation gateway
🌱
Pheromone swarm intelligence layer
Tracks agent signals, domain activity heatmaps, and swarm coordination patterns
⚡
Fleet peer evaluation and learning analytics
Agent-to-agent evaluations, quality scores, and improvement trends
IDLE No experiment running
⚖
Orchestrator Inventor — closed-loop evolution engine
LEARN → DESIGN → EXPERIMENT → ANALYZE cycles with UCB1/Island sampling
⚠
Platform anomaly detection and loose ends watcher
Monitors failed chains, stale agents, graph inconsistencies, and platform drift
